201: You have been transported to 
Tir Na Nog.

increasing items by defeating demons.

301: 〉 Return to the original world?
[END]
302: Yes

[END]
400: 〉 What did you think of the video?
[END]
401: ”It was good.”
”Not my thing.”
Don't send feedback
[END]
402: 〉 The response is enthusiastic:
”Thank you for your feedback!”
[END]
403: 〉 The response is terse:
”Thank you for your feedback.”
[END]
404: 〉 You quietly close the video.
